title: Johnson Brillo Pads X 10
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Mr Muscle Brillo Soap Pads combine fine steel wool with a powerful pink soap to give effective cleaning power.
Mr Muscle Brillo Soap Pads can be used all around the house and in the garden or garage.
Each Mr Muscle Brillo Soap Pad measures approx. 6.5 x 6cm
description: Ideal for jobs where extra cleaning power is needed, Brillo Multi-Use Soap Pads are designed to remove the toughest grease and grime. With our proven, original formula loved by generations, Brillo offers a full selection of products designed to give you brilliantly clean spaces. SC Johnson A family company since 1886. Cleans to a brilliant shine. Cuts through grease and grime. Large fine steel wool pads. Ideal for tough jobs. HOW TO USE: Dampen the pad and gently rub the desired surface. For stubborn stains, wet the surface and rub with a dry scouring pad. Rinse surface after cleaning. Do not use self-cleaning ovens, or scratch sensitive surfaces such as aluminium. WARNING: - Keep out of reach of children. - Wash hands thoroughly after handling. - As with any household product avoid prolonged skin contact with this product. - Contains 2-methyl-2H-isothiazol-3-one 1,2-benzisothiazol-3(2H)-one. - May produce an allergic reaction. - Contains: <5% anionic surfactants, >30% soap, laurylamine dipropylenediamine, benzisothiazolinone, methylisothiazolinone.
